unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: There is paint on Kate's clothes.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: pain(痛苦)里加一个t，粉刷(paint)油漆很累很痛苦。
bed(床) + room(房间) -> 放床的房间就是卧室。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Joe has been eating too much recently.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: recent(最近的) + ly(副词后缀) -> 最近。
re(重新) + pair(一双) -> 重新配对，使恢复正常，即修理。
dirt(泥土) + y(形容词后缀) -> 泥土多的，即脏的。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Somebody has eaten all the chocolates.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: choc(巧) + o + late(克立) -> 巧克力的拼写。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I'm learning Arabic, but I haven't been learning it very long.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: Arab(阿拉伯人) + ic(形容词/名词后缀) -> 阿拉伯语。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I've been meaning to phone Anna, but I keep forgetting.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 这个词有“意思是”的意思，口语里 I've been meaning to 表示我一直打算去做。
tra(他) + vel(围栏) -> 他走出围栏去旅行。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: This year he won the national championship again.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: champion(冠军) + ship(名词后缀) -> 锦标赛/冠军地位。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: When they left college, Lisa and Sue started making films together.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: col + lege(里脊) -> 在大学(college)里吃里脊。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: How many people have you invited?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: in(进入) + vite(招待) -> 请人进来招待，即邀请。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Have you ever worked in a factory?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: fact(制造) + ory(场所) -> 制造东西的场所，即工厂。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: He has appeared in several films.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: ap + pear(梨) -> 树上突然出现了一个梨。
for(为了) + get(得到) -> 为了得到新的，必须忘记(forget)旧的。
